en.label: Why this exists
en.content: This blog is where I turn real building sessions into reusable notes: AI workflows, interface decisions, product judgment, and the small engineering choices that usually disappear after a task is done.
Most posts start from something practical I just changed or tested. The point is not to archive every detail, but to keep the reasoning, tradeoffs, and checks that might help the next project.

zh.label: 为什么写
zh.content: 这个博客用来把真实构建过程沉淀成可复用的记录：AI 工作流、界面判断、产品思考，以及那些做完任务后很容易消失的工程取舍。
这里的大多数文章都来自刚刚做过、改过、验证过的事情。重点不是记录所有细节，而是留下判断依据、取舍过程和下一次还能复用的检查清单。

quote.text: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like. Design is how it works.
quote.author: Steve Jobs
